description: Black shorts made of 100% polyester, has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring, insert pockets on the sides, white panel detailing on the sides extending to the back, mesh panel on the back and printed branding on the left hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; Do not iron on decorations Built with breathability and the zero-distraction-Fit that athletes demand, this pair of puma shorts comes in a sophisticated body-friendly design. This high-performance shorts created from polyester fabric wicks sweat away and keeps you cool, dry and comfortable. Team it with a tee and performance shoes. Model statistics Model is a size M of height 6', chest 39" and shoulders 18”
